programs.title: The Nanny
programs.sub_title: Stop The Wedding, I Want To Get Off
programs.desc: Maxwell's sister Jocelyn gets engaged to Nigel, the Duke of Salisbury, but the wedding seems ill-fated after Fran discovers that Jocelyn is really in love with her chauffeur, Lester.

programs.title: The Nanny
programs.sub_title: Sunday In The Park With Fran
programs.desc: Grace and the son of a prominent theater critic Frank Bradley get in a fight during a trip to the park, and, to break it up, Fran bops the boy with a baguette -- which could mean curtains for Maxwell's newest Broadway play.
